title: The Angel on the Wedding Card
display_title: The Angel on the Wedding Card
wikitext:
[]: The Angel on the Wedding Card             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Oct 21, 2007 5:37 am Did anyone notice that the Angel on the Wedding Card seen in Episode 21 bears an uncanny resemblance to Rei? Is it that Rei's appearance is no accident? In the OP, we see a shot of an out-of-proportion Rei with a glass, she appears somewhat younger than when we see her again. And, of course, there was Child Rei before her, and she got strangled by Naoko. Since Sho and Lilith were fused when Yui disappeared in the CE, is it possible that Lilith's soul and Yui's came into contact? After all, the patterns of both Eva-00 and Eva-01 are supposed to be remarkably similar, and this allows for Rei to use Eva-01 without problems, and for the dummy system to work. (So this is what happened...the contact experiment was with Lilith , not the Eva!) If the Angel on the card was drawn by Yui herself, is it possible that Lilith somehow mistook/thought of herself as a blue-haired childlike Yui, maybe just something from Yui's imagination? If so, we now know why Rei has blue hair and looks like Yui: she was confused or manipulated into seeing herself as something else, and that's why she became what she was. Of course, Kaworu comes up, but we really don't know so much about Kaworu's birth or his genetics donor, so how Kaworu came to look the way he does is something that really can't be talked about clearly. I'll be heading to another place for a couple of days- I dunno if I will be able to access this site in the meantime. For the next couple of days, Ciao!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Oct 21, 2007 9:47 am I don't think that Yui is necessarily supposed to have drawn the postcard herself (tho she likely chose the theme); it's more likely a professional job from a print shop. I figure that the blue-haired angel ends up serving as a little example of typical NGE visual anticipation, the payoff for which, of course, comes up here: Note "Rei floats above Fuyutsuki like an angel ." I think they're very likely trying to tell us something here about how Fuyutsuki feels about Yui in his heart of hearts; i.e. he has a very idealized view of her...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 21, 2007 11:34 am Either way, I think that's a very interesting point, one of those things I certainly missed in Eva! (Then again, what else is new? ) With the "CE actually happened with Lilith, not Eva", is that in terms of trying to get Yui OUT of Shogoki, or when she wanted to "show the bright future to my child", or both, or...? Kinda lost here, that's something else I never fully got. *scratches head* (Though I assumed Kyoko's CE was with Nigoki...) And no, Shin-seiki, Yui-sama IS the angels. ;) (Not the kind Shinji-tachi fight, but you get the idea.) ....Isn't Rei with the jar of water in the Opening actually Rei 1, possibly yet another "hint" about Rei 1 being in Zerogoki (Seeing as she has a 14-year old body but having, uh, Rei 1's head plastered on there, instead?)? That's what I thought about that pic, though I'm probably wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Oct 21, 2007 11:39 am Honestly, I think it was meant to be just a little joke, and nothing more.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 21, 2007 12:27 pm No, everything has SOME meaning to it in Eva! :mrgreen:

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Oct 21, 2007 12:32 pm BrikHaus wrote: Honestly, I think it was meant to be just a little joke, and nothing more.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Oct 21, 2007 12:47 pm BrikHaus wrote: Honestly, I think it was meant to be just a little joke, and nothing more.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Oct 21, 2007 5:36 pm it's foreshadowing but probably doesn't mean Yui knew she'd become Rei

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Oct 24, 2007 1:43 am V wrote: it's foreshadowing but probably doesn't mean Yui knew she'd become Rei

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Oct 24, 2007 1:57 am UrsusArctos wrote: No, I was thinking about the earlier discussions on metaphysical biology, and somewhere somebody mentioned that the harpies' souls were "confused" into thinking that they were all Kaworu's mom or something of that sort. The idea that a soul can be "confused" or somehow manipulated into thinking that it is something else, it can actually become the new thing.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Oct 24, 2007 1:59 am They're being controlled by Kaworu dummy plugs, which don't have his soul in them. It's Kaworu's soul in particular that manipulates the Eva, isn't it? And it's Kyoko's soul residing in Eva-02 that stops him from physically fusing with the Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Oct 24, 2007 2:03 am If the particular brain pattern or whatever can be copied onto the dummy plug and emulated no trickery is needed.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Oct 24, 2007 6:47 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: If the particular brain pattern or whatever can be copied onto the dummy plug and emulated no trickery is needed.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 24, 2007 7:00 am If you're gonna talk about dummy plugs, resurrect this or something.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Oct 24, 2007 7:03 am No necromancy intended, but thanks for the link!

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Thu Oct 25, 2007 5:03 am mmmmmm, necromancy.... I'm gonna agree with Ursus that Lilith was trying to give Fuyutsuki the great fluffy pillow of death in a sense that she tried to find out something beautiful lurking in Fuyutsuki's mind, and extracted it out so that he would be happy before he went Tang. And why is she doing that? idano, maybe it's just a mother's love, or something... and the soul's opinion didn't really have any opinion at all if it wasn't it a Lilith-cloned eva (aka Eva01 and possibly Eva00). I guess you can say when the dummy plugs are inserted it's like the soul in the adam-evas are like children being shown pictures and being asked what they are, and how they aren't really the real thing, but they're still stimulus, to which they respond. And I suppose you can think of the Lilith-Eva's as mature children that know that the picture is a picture and can choose to react as expected or in another way.../random rambling
